description:
🕒 09:30–14:40

Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Hanno Ecotourism Association: https://hanno-tourism.jp/hanno-eco/tour/tanetsuti-1-2/

⚠️ The tour originally scheduled for June 21 (Sunday) has been rescheduled to June 28 (Sunday) due to organizer circumstances.

Learn kincha farming (a method using fallen leaves and branches) while planting summer vegetables and creating garden beds. Hanno Tanetotchi Farm staff advisors will teach planting techniques and growing tips in an easy-to-understand way. Lunch will be served at restaurant "La Nora" featuring Italian dishes made with kincha vegetables.

【Fee】Adults ¥8,800; middle school students and younger ¥2,200 (includes guide, lunch, materials, and insurance)

【Capacity】15 people

【Guide】Hanno Tanetotchi Farm staff

【What to bring】Drinks, hat, towel, work gloves, etc.
location: 集合 ラ・ノーラ前の畑 （飯能市下加治243-25、イーグルバス「飯能靖和病院」下車徒歩8分）
summary: Experience kincha farming and summer vegetable planting in Hanno's forest town
